# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
 * Description: Custom user authentication plugin with secure password hashing
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Your Name
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Custom_User_Authentication {
    
    private $table_name;
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_users';
        
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_form_submissions'));
        add_shortcode('custom_registration', array($this, 'registration_form'));
        add_shortcode('custom_login', array($this, 'login_form'));
    }
    
    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
            id mediumint(9) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            password varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'Custom Auth Users',
            'Custom Auth',
            'manage_options',
            'custom-auth-users',
            array($this, 'admin_page'),
            'dashicons-admin-users',
            30
        );
    }
    
    public function admin_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $users = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT id, username, email, created_at FROM {$this->table_name} ORDER BY created_at DESC");
        
        echo '<div class="wrap">';
        echo '<h1>Custom Authentication Users</h1>';
        echo '<table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">';
        echo '<thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Username</th><th>Email</th><th>Created At</th></tr></thead>';
        echo '<tbody>';
        
        if ($users) {
            foreach ($users as $user) {
                echo '<tr>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->id) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->username) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->email) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->created_at) . '</td>';
                echo '</tr>';
            }
        } else {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="4">No users found</td></tr>';
        }
        
        echo '</tbody></table>';
        echo '</div>';
    }
    
    public function hash_password($password) {
        return password_hash($password, PASSWORD_BCRYPT, array('cost' => 12));
    }
    
    public function verify_password($password, $hash) {
        return password_verify($password, $hash);
    }
    
    public function register_user($username, $email, $password) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'All fields are required');
        }
        
        if (!is_email($email)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid email address');
        }
        
        if (strlen($password) < 6) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Password must be at least 6 characters');
        }
        
        $username = sanitize_user($username);
        $email = sanitize_email($email);
        
        $existing = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s",
            $username,
            $email
        ));
        
        if ($existing) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Username or email already exists');
        }
        
        $hashed_password = $this->hash_password($password);
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
                'password' => $hashed_password
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result) {
            return array('success' => true, 'message' => 'Registration successful');
        } else {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Registration failed');
        }
    }
    
    public function authenticate_user($username, $password) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($password)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Username and password are required');
        }
        
        $username = sanitize_user($username);
        
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s",
            $username
        ));
        
        if (!$user) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid username or password');
        }
        
        if ($this->verify_password($password, $user->password)) {
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_username'] = $user->username;
            
            return array('success' => true, 'message' => 'Login successful', 'user' => $user);
        } else {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid username or password');
        }
    }
    
    public function is_user_logged_in() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        return isset($_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id']);
    }
    
    public function logout_user() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id']);
        unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_username']);
        session_destroy();
    }
    
    public function handle_form_submissions() {
        if (isset($_POST['custom_register_submit'])) {
            if (!isset($_POST['custom_register_nonce']) || 
                !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['custom_register_nonce'], 'custom_register_action')) {
                return;
            }
            
            $username = isset($_POST['username']) ? $_POST['username'] : '';
            $email = isset($_POST['email']) ? $_POST['email'] : '';
            $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? $_POST['password'] : '';
            
            $result = $this->register_user($username, $email, $password);
            
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = $result['message'];
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_message_type'] = $result['success'] ? 'success' : 'error';
        }
        
        if (isset($_POST['custom_login_submit'])) {
            if (!isset($_POST['custom_login_nonce']) || 
                !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['custom_login_nonce'], 'custom_login_action')) {
                return;
            }
            
            $username = isset($_POST['username']) ? $_POST['username'] : '';
            $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? $_POST['password'] : '';
            
            $result = $this->authenticate_user($username, $password);
            
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = $result['message'];
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_message_type'] = $result['success'] ? 'success' : 'error';
        }
        
        if (isset($_GET['custom_logout'])) {
            if (!isset($_GET['_wpnonce']) || 
                !wp_verify_nonce($_GET['_wpnonce'], 'custom_logout_action')) {
                return;
            }
            
            $this->logout_user();
            wp_redirect(remove_query_arg('custom_logout'));
            exit;
        }
    }
    
    public function registration_form() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        
        $message = '';
        if (isset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message'])) {
            $type = $_SESSION['custom_auth_message_type'];
            $message = '<div class="custom-auth-message ' . esc_attr($type) . '">' . 
                       esc_html($_SESSION['custom_auth_message']) . '</div>';
            unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message']);
            unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message_type']);
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="custom-auth-form">
            <?php echo $message; ?>
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('custom_register_action', 'custom_register_nonce'); ?>
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username:</label>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <label for="email">Email:</label>
                    <input type="email" name="email" id="email" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password:</label>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="custom_register_submit" value="Register">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <style>
            .custom-auth-form { max-width: 400px; margin: 20px auto; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #ddd; }
            .custom-auth-form p { margin-bottom: 15px; }
            .custom-auth-form label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; }
            .custom-auth-form input[type="text"], 
            .custom-auth-form input[type="email"], 
            .custom-auth-form input[type="password"] { width: 100%; padding: 8px; box-sizing: border-box; }
            .custom-auth-form input[type="submit"] { background: #0073aa; color: white; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
            .custom-auth-message { padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-radius: 3px; }
            .custom-auth-message.success { background: #d4edda; color: #155724; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; }
            .custom-auth-message.error { background: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; border: 1px solid #f5c6cb; }
        </style>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function login_form() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        
        if ($this->is_user_logged_in()) {
            $logout_url = wp_nonce_url(add_query_arg('custom_logout', '1'), 'custom_logout_action');
            return '<div class="custom-auth-form"><p>Welcome, ' . esc_html($_SESSION['custom_auth_username']) . '!</p>' .
                   '<p><a href="' . esc_url($logout_url) . '">Logout</a></p></div>';
        }
        
        $message = '';
        if (isset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message'])) {
            $type = $_SESSION['custom_auth_message_type'];
            $message = '<div class="custom-auth-message ' . esc_attr($type) . '">' . 
                       esc_html($_SESSION['custom_auth_message']) . '</div>';
            unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message']);
            unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message_type']);
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="custom-auth-form">
            <?php echo $message; ?>
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('custom_login_action', 'custom_login_nonce'); ?>
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username:</label>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password:</label>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="custom_login_submit" value="Login">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

new Custom_User_Authentication();
